channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19419] sanity-sec test_64c: 'Timeout occurred after 451 minutes, last suite running was sanity-sec
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Arshad <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/d66a05dd-b54f-4d82-a028-c4a65e950ba4

test_64c failed with the following error:

Timeout occurred after 451 minutes, last suite running was sanity-sec

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/116846 - 5.15.0-142-generic
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/116846 - 4.18.0-553.71.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

+ [[ -n pool_quota_ops ]]
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -u sanityusr --pool pool64c -B 309200 /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -g sanityusr --pool pool64c -B 309200 /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -p 1000 --pool pool64c -B 309200 /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -U -b 10G -B 11G -i 100K -I 105K /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -G -b 10G -B 11G -i 100K -I 105K /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -P -b 10G -B 11G -i 100K -I 105K /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -u sanityusr -D /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -u sanityusr --delete /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -g sanityusr -D /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -g sanityusr --delete /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -p 1000 -D /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -p 1000 --delete /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ [[ -n pool_quota_ops ]]
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -U --pool pool64c -B 11G /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -G --pool pool64c -B 11G /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ /usr/bin/lfs setquota -P --pool pool64c -B 11G /mnt/lustre
lfs setquota: quotactl failed: Operation not permitted
setquota failed: Operation not permitted
+ set +vx
Destroy the created pools: pool64c
CMD: trevis-85vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl pool_list lustre

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-sec test_64c - Timeout occurred after 451 minutes, last suite running was sanity-sec
item.summary: sanity-sec test_64c: 'Timeout occurred after 451 minutes, last suite running was sanity-sec

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment: The failure only occurred on Ubuntu 22.04 client.
